query:
SELECT 
  u.id as user_id,
  u.name as user_name,
  u.roles,
  p.id as partner_id,
  p.isActive as partner_is_active,
  pc.id as partner_city_id,
  pc.cityId,
  c.name as city_name
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN partners p ON u.id = p.userId
LEFT JOIN partner_cities pc ON p.id = pc.partnerId
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE u.phone LIKE '%13860029%' OR u.name LIKE '%test%';
